do: Use punchy verbs (ignites, banked, drift, stake)
Speak in numbers and physics (+240 sats, Wave 4)
Reference orbital mechanics naturally (orbits, drift, cascade)
Reward the curious with classical and scientific Easter eggs
Pair short verb-noun phrases for rhythm
dont: Cheerlead the player (Awesome job!, You crushed it!)
Over-explain Bitcoin, Lightning, or Nostr in-game

examples.greeting: Pallasite ignites. Press Enter to drift.
examples.error: Hull breached. Press Enter to spawn.
examples.cta: Sign with Signet. Stake your name on Nostr.

github.name: forgesworn/pallasite
github.note: Standalone 'pallasite' user is taken; project lives under the forgesworn org
